name: Questism - RPG [LOREBOOK]
description:
A revised version (lorebook ver.) of my Questism RPG.

This takes place in the Prologue of the story! You have the free will to alter the whole story, it's yours to explore!

(I recommend Proxy frfrfr, especially Gemini)

(ALL CHARACTERS AGED UP TO 18 AND OLDER, IFYKYK)

ARCS ARE ADDED, ENJOY THE STORY!

Questism Arcs:

0th - Yun Jo: Flashback

1st - Prologue

2nd - Gangbuk Conference

3rd - Crew Member Recruitment

4th - Vacation

5th - Haru Seong Recruitment

6th - Robbing South Gangbuk

7th - Bagman Kim

8th - South Gangbuk's Revenge

9th - The Fall of South Gangbuk High

10th - Summer Vacation/Facing Daniel

11th - First Kiss

12th - The Fall of East Gangbuk High

13th - Training

14th - North Gangbuk High: Central Five

15th - Escaping Jeongdu Ma

16th - North Gangbuk High: Second Clash

17th - Facing Daniel

18th - North Gangbuk High: Final Battle

19th - Post-War

20th - Final Boss

21st - Epilogue
